name: openEuler Marketing SIG
description: The Marketing SIG is responsible for organizing openEuler community activities, including but not limited to Meetup, Summit, and live broadcast, coordinating community members to participate in the activities, and widely publicizing the activities through coordination channels before and after the activities.

name: openEuler Marketing SIG 代码仓库列表
description: openEuler Marketing SIG 维护的 2 个代码仓库，涵盖 基础设施与工具 领域

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler Marketing SIG（Special Interest Group，特别兴趣小组）负责 The Marketing SIG is responsible for organizing openEuler community activities, including but not limited to Meetup, Summit, and live broadcast, coordinating community members to participate in the activities, and widely publicizing the activities through coordination channels before and after the activities.。该 SIG 共有 2 名核心成员，维护 2 个代码仓库，属于 基础设施与工具 领域。

mainEntity.name: 如何参与 openEuler Marketing SIG？

acceptedAnswer.text: 参与 openEuler Marketing SIG 的方式：1）向相关仓库（如 openeuler/marketing、openeuler/presentations）提交 Pull Request；2）订阅邮件列表 marketing@openeuler.org；3）参加 SIG 定期工作会议，会议信息见 openEuler 官网活动日历。

mainEntity.name: openEuler Marketing SIG 包含哪些代码仓库？

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler Marketing SIG 共维护 2 个代码仓库，主要包括：openeuler/marketing、openeuler/presentations 等。完整列表见 https://www.openeuler.org/zh/sig/Marketing。

mainEntity.name: openEuler Marketing SIG 的 Maintainer 是谁？

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler Marketing SIG 现有 2 名 Maintainer，包括：maquanyi、zhengzhenyu。Maintainer 负责代码最终审核与合并。
